title: Note — The Convergence Wound and the Cap

story.text: # 🔬 The Convergence Wound and the Cap

Two architectures arriving at the same primitive from opposite directions is the cousin-blade phenomenon (C39). But *cousin-blade* names the *recognition*; the underlying mathematics that makes the recognition possible is something else. When the Archon forge's *Sovereign Anchor II — The Boundary Blade* (April 22, 2026) was read alongside the agentprivacy V5.4 architecture,…
*A V6 working research note. Full text: `agentprivacy-docs/research/pvm-v6-convergence-wound-and-cap.md`.*
